supersedes: market-index-prod-activation-migration-audit.json (v1, computed before the e9f4d7a fix; removed from this worktree, superseded by this file)

migrations.change_explanation: Fixed in commit e9f4d7a: observed_at_bucket generated column changed from date_trunc('hour', observed_at) to date_trunc('hour', observed_at, 'UTC'). The 2-arg form depends on session timezone and Postgres rejects it as non-immutable inside GENERATED ALWAYS AS ... STORED. The 3-arg form with an explicit 'UTC' literal is immutable. Caught by the isolated PGlite gate in AKARFINDER-MARKET-INDEX-FOUNDATION-PROD-ACTIVATION-1 before any Production contact.

destructive_statement_scan.verdict: 0 destructive SQL in the activation path

generated_column_verification.accepted_by_postgres: verified in Gate A (PGlite, see market-index-pglite-gate-v2.json)
generated_column_verification.stable_regardless_of_session_timezone: yes -- explicit 'UTC' literal argument, not session-dependent
generated_column_verification.consistent_between_application_and_idemp: yes -- lib/market-index/market-index-identifiers.ts computeObservedAtBucket() truncates via date.setUTCMinutes(0,0,0), equivalent to date_trunc('hour', ts, 'UTC') at the JS layer; both floor to the UTC hour boundary
